enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his day in Boulder — working on his website, napping unexpectedly, and visiting his mom who introduced him to a light therapy pen she wants him to try. He discusses the device (which supposedly recharges DNA with colored lights), the cost of the pen ($500) and related training ($4,000), and his mom's suggestion he could use it to make money.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Skeptical but intrigued — doesn't know how much it actually does but finds it cool-looking and likes the idea of it
Strongly prefers self-employment over working for others
Has been avoiding videos because feeling behind on work makes him want to sacrifice everything else
Open to it if discounted, sees potential income opportunity

entities: Claude (author of a book about light therapy, last name unknown)
